title: Morphilla
description: Morphilla is a (vanilla) plugin that makes transforming into a mob possible without any mod!
body:
**Morphilla** is a lightweight **Spigot/Paper/Bukkit 1.21.x** plugin that lets players morph into vanilla Minecraft entities with simple commands.
Powered by **ProtocolLib**, all transformations are purely visual and require no client-side mods or resource packs.

### ✨ Features

* `/morph <entity>` → Morph into any vanilla entity.
* `/demorph` → Revert back to your normal player appearance.
* `/previewmorph` → Preview your current morph.
* Permissions: `morphilla.commands`, `morphilla.players.*`
* Fully compatible with the latest **Bukkit/Spigot/Paper 1.21.x** builds.
* Lightweight!

### 🎯 Use cases

* Roleplay servers with immersive transformations.
* Minigames where players can disguise as mobs.
* Fun server perks (VIP ranks morphing into special mobs).

(Soon an API will be released, and soon open-source!)
